explanations.label: AMENITY DENSITY
explanations.sentence: 2,028 amenity density (1,620 restaurants + 360 cafes + 48 schools). excellent — Top 25% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=113, p90=1,852). adds 15.5 of 18.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: TRANSIT ACCESS
explanations.sentence: 1,100 transit access (540 bus stops + 560 stations). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=2, p90=539). adds 18.0 of 18.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.label: FOOD ACCESS
explanations.sentence: 110 food access (110 grocery stores). below average — bottom half of GTA neighborhoods (p10=38, p90=325). adds 3.5 of 14.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.sentence: 70 green space (70 parks). about average for the GTA (p10=5, p90=143). adds 4.7 of 10.0 possible points to your total.

explanations.sentence: 940 services (940 service businesses). excellent — Top 10% of GTA neighborhoods (p10=84, p90=772). adds 7.5 of 7.5 possible points to your total.
